en: I was just wondering who's second. There isn't another show.
ko: 다른 프로그램이 없다면 누가 두 번째인지 궁금했어요.

en: Who is second? Who would be second? Yeah, see, there you go.
Dr. Drew, probably, I guess. I don't know. Who knows?
ko: 보세요, 아마 드류 박사일 것 같아요.

en: Yeah, but what is your diagnosis of Donald Trump?
ko: 도널드 트럼프에 대한 당신의 진단은 무엇인가요?

en: Well, you know, I've known Trump for a long time.
ko: 글쎄요, 저는 트럼프를 오래 알았고, 사람들이 그가 진단 가능한지 아닌지 스스로 판단할 수 있다고 생각해요.

en: And I think people can make up their own minds about whether he's diagnosable or not.
But I would say we can probably all agree that he lacks diplomacy.
Has he offered you a position in his cabinet of any kind?
ko: 그가 당신에게 어떤 내각 자리라도 제안한 적이 있나요?

en: No. He has not? He's not reached out and said, you could be Surgeon General? No.
ko: 아니요라면, 아직 연락해서 당신이 의무총감 자리를 맡아 달라고 한 적도 없나요?

en: Because I saw they gave it to another guy. Yeah, they gave it to another guy.
Yeah. Nothing like that, huh? I think, wouldn't you agree he lacks diplomacy?
Yes, I would agree. Would you agree that he has an impulse control problem?
ko: 그가 충동 조절 문제를 가지고 있다고 동의하나요?

en: Yes, I absolutely would agree with that.
ko: 네, 그 점에 대해서는 전적으로 동의해요.

en: Would you agree that he thinks people see things from only his point of view?
ko: 그가 사람들을 오직 자신의 관점에서만 본다고 생각하나요?

en: Well, I think he would like it that way, yeah.
ko: 글쎄요, 그는 그렇게 생각하고 싶어 할 것 같아요.
